# Hash-locked lockfile for .clusterfuzzlite/requirements.in - required so
# Scorecard's Pinned-Dependencies check accepts 'pip3 install --require-hashes'
# in .clusterfuzzlite/Dockerfile. Regenerate with:
#
#   pip install pip-tools
#   pip-compile --generate-hashes --output-file=.clusterfuzzlite/requirements.txt .clusterfuzzlite/requirements.in
#
